message.qoh.not_tamed_or_owner: [QoH] This horse is not tamed or you are not the owner!
message.qoh.binding_error: [QoH] Failed to bind to horse! Check logs for details.
lore.qoh.transfer_tip: To transfer ownership, right-click the horse as the owner, then right-click the new owner.
yacl3.config.qoh:config.TwoPlayerRideEna: Can two (2) players ride on a horse?
config.qoh.description.CanHorsesSwim: If enabled, horses can swim in water instead of sinking. (Note, you will not get kicked off of the horse when its underwater)
config.qoh.description.TwoPlayerRideEnab: If enabled, two players can ride the same horse.
config.qoh.description.HorsesCanHaveChes: If enabled, right-clicking a horse with a chest will let you put a chest on it (like a donkey or mule), right-click with shears to remove the chest
config.qoh.description.inventoryColumns: Set the number of inventory columns the horse's chest will contain.
config.qoh.description.HorseFollowsOwner: If enabled, horses will automatically follow their owner whenever possible. (This will allow horses to teleport)
config.qoh.description.HorseStartsFollow: How far away does the player need to be for the horse to start following them
config.qoh.description.HorseStopsFollowi: The distance a tamed horse will stop following you
config.qoh.description.HorseFollowSpeedM: How much faster the horse will move when following the player. Setting this to 1 changes nothing.
config.qoh.description.TeleportWhenFurth: If the horse is further away from the player than this distance, it will teleport to the player
painting.qoh.how_hungry.title: How Hungry
painting.qoh.how_hungry.author: Unknown
